pool.baseline: it's just so quiet. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking i heard him, but its just the silence. the house feels like a tomb and honestly i dont even know why i bother getting out of bed anymore. what's the point of even existing when the only person who made it all make sense is just... gone. i feel like a ghost.

pool.baseline: everything just feels so pointless lately. i was looking at the stars tonight and it just hit me that in a few billion years the sun is gonna die and everything we've ever done or felt or been will literally just be nothing. like, why even bother trying to build a life or struggle through anything when the end result is just total emptiness? it feels like we're just playing a game that's rigged to end in zero.

pool.baseline: i honestly don't even know why i'm still waking up every morning. the lab results came back today and it was another dead end... another year of my life just gone. the funding is drying up and honestly, i feel like i've just been a ghost in that department for years. everything i worked for feels like a joke. i'm just so incredibly tired of trying to prove i matter.

pool.baseline: The candles flicker low, dear friend, and the shadows in this parlor grow long and heavy, like the weight upon my very soul. He is gone... everything I built my heart upon has crumbled into nothingness. I feel as though I am but a ghost wandering through a ruined life. There is no more light to find, only the cold, quiet peace of the coming night. I find myself longing to simply... cease. To let the curtain fall on this wretched play before the final act becomes too much to bear.
